title: Item 357
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Item 357''' was the amendment to procurement regulations created by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[HM-3]]. It passed in the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Policy and Resources Council]], allowing Solo to expand his power to change new laws.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''
